info.name: Oracle Simphony Business Intelligence API _ v1.4
info.description:
### Documentation

Instructions on how to use this collection are available on the Oracle Help Center, here: [https://docs.oracle.com/en/industries/food-beverage/back-office/20.1/biapi/postman_collections.html](https://)

Documentation of all endpoints are available on the Oracle Help Center, here: [https://docs.oracle.com/en/industries/food-beverage/back-office/20.1/biapi/rest-endpoints.html](https://)

### Version History

1.0 Initial Release

1.1 Added Order Channel Dimensions and Order Channel Daily Totals (R&A 20.1.15)

1.2 Added pre-request scripts to generate code challenge and code verifier for manual authentication workflow

1.3 Added new Quarter Hour aggregation endpoints (R&A 20.1.16)

1.4 Added new Time Cards endpoint (R&A 20.2)

item.name: Get combo item quarter hour totals
Get job code quarter hour  totals
Get menu item quarter hour totals
Get order type quarter hour totals
Get service charge quarter hour totals
Get tender media quarter hour totals
Get guest check line item extensibility details
Get point of sale journal log details
Get point of sale waste details
Get guest checks - specific check number
Get guest checks - menu item sales in specific time range

body.raw:
{ //getting all menu item sales details for checks with menu items rung in between 16 and 17 o'clock
    "applicationName": "{{appName}}",
    "opnBusDt": "{{env_busDate}}",
    "locRef": "{{env_locRef}}",
    "include": "curUTC, locRef, guestChecks.chkNum, guestChecks.opnUTC, guestChecks.detailLines.detailUTC, guestChecks.detailLines.prepCost, guestChecks.detailLines.aggTtl, guestChecks.detailLines.aggQty, guestChecks.detailLines.menuItem.miNum",
    "searchCriteria": "where (startsWith(guestChecks.detailLines.detailUTC, '2023-08-02T17:') or startsWith(guestChecks.detailLines.detailUTC, '2023-08-02T16:')) and !isNull(guestChecks.detailLines.menuItem.miNum)"
}

item.name: Get menu item daily totals - include all, search MI number range
Get cash management item - search for item num > 0, name with "C", record num < 250
Get menu item prices - find not effective prices in a specific range
Get employee dimensions - search for negated "less than", fName starts with, payrollID
Get job codes - Include specific field, search for number, name, labor category
Get guest checks - open businessdate and all attributes
Get guest checks - realtime checks of the last 30 mintues

exec: //console.log('30 minutes prior to now in UTC: ' + minutesAgo.format(("YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:00")));
console.log('Current value of variable auto_env_changedSinceUTC: ' + auto_env_changedSinceUTC);
console.log('Current value of variable auto_env_today: ' + auto_env_today);
console.log('auto_env_changedSinceUTC variable wasnt set, now it is set to 30 minutes ago: ' + minutesAgo.format(("YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:00")));
console.log('auto_env_today variable is now set to: ' + today.format(("YYYY-MM-DD")));
console.log('auto_env_changedSinceUTC variable was old and is now set to 30 minutes ago: ' + minutesAgo.format(("YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:00")));
console.log('auto_env_today variable was old and is now set to: ' + today.format(("YYYY-MM-DD")));
console.log('auto_env_changedSinceUTC variable is now set to the value returned by the API: ' + jsonData.curUTC);
console.log('auto_env_today variable is now set to the date returned by the API: ' + jsonData.curUTC.substring(0, 10));
